questions.question: Which band generally provides longer distance ground-wave communication than VHF/UHF?
questions.reason: HF signals can travel much further and may also use ionospheric propagation for long-distance contacts.

questions.question: What is the most likely effect of a high, clear line-of-sight path at VHF?
questions.reason: VHF/UHF communications are strongly dependent on line-of-sight; fewer obstructions usually improves range.

questions.question: During strong tropospheric conditions, what can happen on VHF/UHF?

options.text: Signals may travel unusually long distances

questions.reason: Temperature inversions and ducting can allow VHF/UHF signals to travel much further than normal.
